overviewPage.title: Ecosystem Overview
overviewPage.subtitle: Explore the vision, architectural principles, and roadmap behind Kutra.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: At Kutra, we are building a secure, high-performance, and decentralized digital ecosystem. From identity verification to personal AI assistants, we design next-generation infrastructures that allow individuals and businesses to move safely in the digital world with full control over their data.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Cryptographic protection for all user credentials, zero-knowledge principles, and secure storage.

ux.title: Premium UI & Experience
ux.desc: Custom designs featuring micro-interactions, responsive layouts, and intuitive user experiences.

decentralization.title: Decentralized Infrastructure
decentralization.desc: Web3, blockchain verification, and sovereign identity solutions to eliminate single points of failure.

tech.title: Architecture and Technology
tech.desc: Our software infrastructure is built with modern, fast, and secure tools to guarantee reliability and performance.

stack.frontend: Modern technologies including Next.js, React, and Framer Motion for high-quality interactive interfaces.
stack.backend: High-performance Edge environments, Cloudflare Workers, and Serverless computing.
stack.web3: Smart contracts on verifiable credentials, decentralized networks, and modern protocols.

p1.title: Phase 1: Secure Identity and Authentication
p1.desc: Introduction of ProjBrand ID, Authenticator, and unified security layers to establish a trust protocol.

p2.title: Phase 2: Decentralized Web and Verification
p2.desc: Enabling Web3 exploration via Chain Browser and verifiable certificate ownership with CertWallet.

p3.title: Phase 3: AI Assistants and Domain Systems
p3.desc: Integration of the Simay AI assistant and deployment of Kutra decentralized domains for global address resolution.
